news.title: Lugnut joins the roster
news.body: Casey "Lugnut" Park has officially joined Suffering Builds Character as our newest Rocket League striker. Welcome to the grind.

news.title: Regional LAN results
news.body: Wrench Monkey led the squad to a Top 8 finish at the Spring Regional LAN. Full recap coming soon.

news.title: New Discord server live
news.body: We've relaunched our Discord with dedicated channels per game. Ask a member for an invite.
